candidates.why: Direct top-line operating revenue label; more specific and preferable to broader totals like Total income.
Broad total that includes other operating income, so less appropriate than pure revenue.

candidates.why: Financial income, not operating revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Tax item, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the pure sales/revenue line rather than Total income, which includes other operating income.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line for an oil and gas producer.

variables.notes: Production costs is the closest direct production/service cost line.

candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket; not a total and excludes clearly identified D&A/impairments.
Dedicated R&D line above operating profit; should also be included in XSGA when not already embedded, so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Classic SG&A overhead component.
Balance sheet/current liability related to employees, not an income statement overhead expense row.
Balance sheet asset row, not SG&A.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|double. No explicit single SG&A subtotal exists. Selected overhead components only. Included Research & Development Expense as required because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense line and does not appear embedded in the other chosen buckets.

candidates.why: Direct dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit.
Core recurring interest expense on debt; strongest match.
Generic interest expense label, likely same concept in earlier year(s).
Recurring lease-related interest expense; should be included with financing costs.
Capitalized interest offsets/defers expense rather than representing current-period interest expense to include directly.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of interest rate hedges (ineffectiveness)
candidates.why: Fair value/hedging item, explicitly excluded by finance cost rule.
Could include recurring finance costs, but avoid when granular interest rows exist.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting because primary statement has Interest on lease debt.

Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.
Balance sheet payable, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest expense components and a label fallback across years. Excluded net finance totals, fair value hedge items, supplemental duplicates, and capitalized interest to avoid double counting/non-expense items.

candidates.why: Component of equity, not the full book equity denominator.

Acceptable fallback total equity line, but broader than Shareholders' Equity - Total.

variables.notes: Preferred Shareholders' Equity - Total as the best equity line attributable to shareholders. Included Total Equity as fallback priority only. No non-controlling interest line is visible.
